tips_en: Start with GenCeption (Paper 1) — its idea of repurposing text-to-video diffusion models for unified multi-task perception is a paradigm shift, achieving SOTA with 7×–500× less data. It pairs naturally with Vidu S1 (Paper 2), since both creatively repurpose video generation models (one for perception, one for real-time interaction). Paper 3's Terminal-Bench offers a sobering counterpoint, revealing that long-horizon completion—not local reasoning—is the real bottleneck for even frontier agents.
tips_zh: 建议先读 GenCeption（论文1）——它将文本到视频扩散模型重新用于统一多任务感知，是一项范式转换的创新，且以 7×–500× 更少的数据达到了 SOTA。它与 Vidu S1（论文2）可对照阅读，两者都创造性地复用了视频生成模型（一个用于感知，一个用于实时交互）。论文3的 Terminal-Bench 则提供了一个冷静的反观，揭示了即使是前沿智能体，长程任务的完成仍是真正的瓶颈。
